subject: npmx Weekly #13
headline: npmx Weekly #13
intro: Exciting updates are here to improve your experience with npmx! Dive into our latest enhancements that promise optimized performance and a more seamless user interface.

topics.title: Pagination and Performance Issues
topics.summary: Recent updates have resolved critical pagination performance issues that caused browser crashes when scrolling past 1000 results. The implementation of a termination check in the fetchMore function prevents freezing, ensuring a smoother experience.

topics.title: Brand Page Enhancements
topics.summary: Improvements to the brand page have addressed PNG download issues and layout shifts during server-side rendering, ensuring correct asset downloads and preventing visual discrepancies for a better user experience.

topics.title: Enhanced Package Comparison Features
topics.summary: Users can now visually compare up to 10 packages using scatter charts, improving analytical capabilities and facilitating informed decision-making.
